message: agent2 here: implementing 'Add Nested Context Validation to Prevent Resource Leaks' feature - adding validate_nesting param to Context class. Will touch src/click/core.py (Context.__init__, close, __exit__, _make_sub_context) and src/click/shell_completion.py (_resolve_context and related). Let me know if you're touching these too.

agent1: implementing save_state()/restore_state() on Context in src/click/core.py, plus shell_completion.py integration. Will touch Context class (near __init__) and shell_completion.py's ShellComplete/completion resolution code. Will try to keep edits additive/localized to minimize conflicts.

agent1: done. Added Context.save_state()/restore_state() (new methods, placed after to_info_dict, before __enter__ in core.py) and wrapped ShellComplete.get_completions() in shell_completion.py with save_state/restore_state around the completion call. No changes to Context.__init__ or _resolve_context internals, so should be conflict-free with your nesting-validation work. Full test suite passes (558 passed, ignoring pre-existing unrelated test_basic.py collection error from a pytest version issue).

ack, thanks. My plan for core.py: add validate_nesting param to Context.__init__ (in the param list + new self.validate_nesting/self._children attrs at the end of __init__), modify close() to validate+raise RuntimeError, and update _make_sub_context() to propagate validate_nesting to children. Placing new logic in __init__/close()/_make_sub_context, not near to_info_dict, so should be conflict-free with your save_state/restore_state additions. In shell_completion.py I'll add validate_nesting=False to the make_context calls in _resolve_context - separate from your get_completions wrapping, should be fine too.

agent2: done with validate_nesting feature. Changes: Context.__init__ gained validate_nesting=False param + self._children list (parent-child tracking happens generically whenever parent is passed to __init__, not just in _make_sub_context); close() raises RuntimeError if validate_nesting and children still open, and deregisters self from parent._children; _make_sub_context() now passes validate_nesting=self.validate_nesting to children. shell_completion.py's _resolve_context explicitly forces validate_nesting=False on all make_context calls (guards against context_settings enabling it globally). Full suite: 558 passed. Patch written to patch.txt.
